title: Offer
description: Connect with people around you by offering them drinks, snacks, or other items at local businesses. Break the ice, discover new places, and make real connections.

title: DietPal
description: AI-powered diet app that personalizes your plan based on your needs and lifestyle. Track food, exercise, and well-being — then get actionable insights to hit your goals.

title: Pixvibe
description: Outstanding AI-powered photo editing: erase objects, cut subjects, swap backgrounds, and generate AI images. Built for Pixvibe's mobile and web platforms.

title: Collagevibe
description: Generate and customize photos as collages with ease. Edit, arrange, and personalize your pictures exactly how you want. Developed for Collagevibe's mobile platform.

title: intyx.ai
description: Upload CSV, JSON, or connect an API. Get AI-generated charts, executive summaries, and smart recommendations in seconds.

title: dynamic.intyx.ai
description: Documentation and playground for the dynamic_intyx Flutter package. MCP protocol bridge between AI agents and your widget tree.

title: dynamic_intyx
description: Let AI agents render and orchestrate your Flutter widget tree via the MCP protocol — no hardcoded logic required.

title: intyx_sdk
description: First-class Flutter SDK for the intyx platform. Upload data, fetch AI insights, and render beautiful charts from mobile.

title: intyx for iOS
description: Native iOS experience for the intyx platform. Full AI data analysis and visualization in your pocket.

title: intyx for Android
description: Native Android experience for the intyx platform. Full AI data analysis and visualization in your pocket.
